entry.title: Clotilde Courau maman : cette décision qui a fait basculer l’avenir de ses filles

link.title: Clotilde Courau maman : cette décision qui a fait basculer l’avenir de ses filles

entry.content: Clotilde Courau est la mère de Vittoria et Luisa, fruits de ses amours avec son mari le prince Emmanuel-Philibert de Savoie. Les adolescentes, toutes deux princesses, ont vu en 2019 leur avenir bouleversé grâce à une décision historique venant de leur grand-père. Explications avec Non Stop People.
entry.summary: Clotilde Courau est la mère de Vittoria et Luisa, fruits de ses amours avec son mari le prince Emmanuel-Philibert de Savoie. Les adolescentes, toutes deux princesses, ont vu en 2019 leur avenir bouleversé grâce à une décision historique venant de leur grand-père. Explications avec Non Stop People.

entry.title: Reigning NFL MVP Jackson not focused on Mahomes’ record contract

link.title: Reigning NFL MVP Jackson not focused on Mahomes’ record contract

entry.content: Jackson focused on winning the Super Bowl not fellow quarterback Patrick Mahomes’ record-breaking contract
entry.summary: Jackson focused on winning the Super Bowl not fellow quarterback Patrick Mahomes’ record-breaking contract

entry.title: Liban : pour quelles raisons Emmanuel Macron se rend-il à Beyrouth ?

link.title: Liban : pour quelles raisons Emmanuel Macron se rend-il à Beyrouth ?

entry.content:
Le chef de l’État, Emmanuel Macron, est à Beyrouth, jeudi, deux jours après les puissantes explosions qui ont dévasté une large partie de la capitale libanaise. Au-delà d’une aide immédiate à une ville ravagée, il va aborder la question d’un soutien de plus long terme à un pays profondément déstabilisé.
Retrouvez "La matinale d’Europe 1 - Le 6h - 9h" sur :
entry.summary: Le chef de l’État, Emmanuel Macron, est à Beyrouth, jeudi, deux jours après les puissantes explosions qui ont dévasté une large partie de la capitale libanaise. Au-delà d’une aide immédiate à une ville ravagée, il va aborder la question d’un soutien de plus long terme à un pays profondément déstabilisé. Retrouvez "La matinale d’Europe 1 - Le 6h - 9h" sur :

entry.title: Hardik Pandya & Natasa Stankovic’s Baby Boy’s Name revealed, Here’s what it is वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Hardik Pandya & Natasa Stankovic’s Baby Boy’s Name revealed, Here’s what it is वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Hardik Pandya and his ladylove Natasa Stankovic welcomed their first child together a baby boy on July 30th. The duo got engaged in New Year and got married earlier this year. Naturally, the couple is in celebration mode. Hardik Pandya took to Instagram to share pictures from their celebration at the hospital as Natasa got discharged.
भारतीय क्रिकेट टीम के ऑलराउंडर खिलाड़ी हार्दिक पांड्या 30 जुलाई को पापा बने। इस खुशखबरी को हार्दिक ने खुद अपने सोशल मीडिया अकाउंट के जरिए फैंस को दी। हाल ही में हार्दिक पांड्या ने बच्चे की कई फोटोज तो शेयर की लेकिन अब तक जूनियर पांड्या का नाम सामने नहीं आया था। लेकिन अब हार्दिक के बेबी बॉय का नाम सामने आया है। दरअसल हॉस्पीटल से छुट्टी मिलने के बाद इस कपल ने वहां के स्टॉफ के साथ केक काटा
#HardikPandya #NatashaStankovic #HardikNatashaSon
entry.summary: Hardik Pandya and his ladylove Natasa Stankovic welcomed their first child together a baby boy on July 30th. The duo got engaged in New Year and got married earlier this year. Naturally, the couple is in celebration mode. Hardik Pandya took to Instagram to share pictures from their celebration at the hospital as Natasa got discharged. भारतीय क्रिकेट टीम के ऑलराउंडर खिलाड़ी हार्दिक पांड्या 30 जुलाई को पापा बने। इस खुशखबरी को हार्दिक ने खुद अपने सोशल मीडिया अकाउंट के जरिए फैंस को दी। हाल ही में हार्दिक पांड्या ने बच्चे की कई फोटोज तो शेयर की लेकिन अब तक जूनियर पांड्या का नाम सामने नहीं आया था। लेकिन अब हार्दिक के बेबी बॉय का नाम सामने आया है। दरअसल हॉस्पीटल से छुट्टी मिलने के बाद इस कपल ने वहां के स्टॉफ के साथ केक काटा #HardikPandya #NatashaStankovic #HardikNatashaSon

entry.title: Bouches-du-Rhône : les pompiers luttent pour éteindre les incendies

link.title: Bouches-du-Rhône : les pompiers luttent pour éteindre les incendies

entry.content:
Près de 1 800 pompiers ont lutté contre les incendies près de Martigues (Bouches-du-Rhône). Un nouveau feu virulent s’est déclaré mercredi 5 août dans le secteur de Vitrolles. 
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Près de 1 800 pompiers ont lutté contre les incendies près de Martigues (Bouches-du-Rhône). Un nouveau feu virulent s’est déclaré mercredi 5 août dans le secteur de Vitrolles. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: ആദ്യ ശിലയിട്ട് നരേന്ദ്ര മോദി;പാകിയത് 40 കിലോയുള്ള വെള്ളി

link.title: ആദ്യ ശിലയിട്ട് നരേന്ദ്ര മോദി;പാകിയത് 40 കിലോയുള്ള വെള്ളി

entry.content:
PM Modi lays foundation stone for Ram temple in Ayodhya
അയോധ്യയിലെ രാമക്ഷേത്ര നിര്‍മ്മാണത്തിന് പ്രധാനമന്ത്രി നരേന്ദ്ര മോദി തറക്കല്ലിട്ടു. 40 കിലോ ഗ്രാം തൂക്കമുള്ള വെള്ളിശിലയാണ് ശിലാസ്ഥാപനത്തിന് ഉപയോഗിച്ചത്. ഉച്ചയ്ക്ക് 12.30ന് ആരംഭിച്ച പൂജകൾക്കുശേഷമാണ് പ്രധാനമന്ത്രി നരേന്ദ്ര മോദി ശിലാസ്ഥാപന കർമം നടത്തിയത്.
entry.summary: PM Modi lays foundation stone for Ram temple in Ayodhya അയോധ്യയിലെ രാമക്ഷേത്ര നിര്‍മ്മാണത്തിന് പ്രധാനമന്ത്രി നരേന്ദ്ര മോദി തറക്കല്ലിട്ടു. 40 കിലോ ഗ്രാം തൂക്കമുള്ള വെള്ളിശിലയാണ് ശിലാസ്ഥാപനത്തിന് ഉപയോഗിച്ചത്. ഉച്ചയ്ക്ക് 12.30ന് ആരംഭിച്ച പൂജകൾക്കുശേഷമാണ് പ്രധാനമന്ത്രി നരേന്ദ്ര മോദി ശിലാസ്ഥാപന കർമം നടത്തിയത്.

entry.title: Endings, Beginnings trailer - Shailene Woodley, Jamie Dornan, and Sebastian Stan

link.title: Endings, Beginnings trailer - Shailene Woodley, Jamie Dornan, and Sebastian Stan

entry.content:
From the acclaimed director of Like Crazy, Drake Doremus’ Endings, Beginnings is a sincere and emotionally charged romantic drama with an all-star cast of Shailene Woodley (Big Little Lies, Adrift, Divergent), Jamie Dornan (Fifty Shades, A Private War) and Sebastian Stan (The Avengers, I, Tonya).
Daphne (Woodley), a young woman recovering from a break-up is at a turning point in her life and embarks on a few months of self-introspection. But when she meets friends Jack (Dornan) and Frank (Stan) at a party, everything changes. Daphne becomes involved with both of them, starting a steamy and complicated love triangle.
ENDINGS, BEGINNINGS also stars Matthew Gray Gubler (The Life Aquatic), Lindsay Sloane (Horrible Bosses) and Shamier Anderson (Wynonna Earp) directed by Drake Doremus and written by Drake Doremus with novelist Jardine Libaire.
Signature Entertainment presents Endings, Beginnings on Digital HD from August 7th on Amazon, Sky, Virgin, iTunes.
entry.summary: From the acclaimed director of Like Crazy, Drake Doremus’ Endings, Beginnings is a sincere and emotionally charged romantic drama with an all-star cast of Shailene Woodley (Big Little Lies, Adrift, Divergent), Jamie Dornan (Fifty Shades, A Private War) and Sebastian Stan (The Avengers, I, Tonya). Daphne (Woodley), a young woman recovering from a break-up is at a turning point in her life and embarks on a few months of self-introspection. But when she meets friends Jack (Dornan) and Frank (Stan) at a party, everything changes. Daphne becomes involved with both of them, starting a steamy and complicated love triangle. ENDINGS, BEGINNINGS also stars Matthew Gray Gubler (The Life Aquatic), Lindsay Sloane (Horrible Bosses) and Shamier Anderson (Wynonna Earp) directed by Drake Doremus and written by Drake Doremus with novelist Jardine Libaire. Signature Entertainment presents Endings, Beginnings on Digital HD from August 7th on Amazon, Sky, Virgin, iTunes.

entry.title: Elephant scratches head on tree while out for morning walk

link.title: Elephant scratches head on tree while out for morning walk

entry.content:
This is the adorable moment an elephant scratches its head and body against the rough surface of a tree.
The jumbo was out for a walk in a nearby forest in Phuket, Thailand, when it suddenly felt an itch.
Elephants Phang-Om-Suk and Phang-Om-Ploy were happily scratching their itch using the trees in the field.
Owner Don said he was lucky enough to capture the beautiful moment on his phone.
A friend his heard saying in the video: "Go on, scratch more and enjoy.’’
He added: ‘‘These elephants are really funny and gentle creatures."
There are an estimated 2,000 that live in the wild in the country and around double that amount in captivity where they are in zoos, sanctuaries or private homes.
entry.summary: This is the adorable moment an elephant scratches its head and body against the rough surface of a tree. The jumbo was out for a walk in a nearby forest in Phuket, Thailand, when it suddenly felt an itch. Elephants Phang-Om-Suk and Phang-Om-Ploy were happily scratching their itch using the trees in the field. Owner Don said he was lucky enough to capture the beautiful moment on his phone. A friend his heard saying in the video: "Go on, scratch more and enjoy.’’ He added: ‘‘These elephants are really funny and gentle creatures." There are an estimated 2,000 that live in the wild in the country and around double that amount in captivity where they are in zoos, sanctuaries or private homes.

entry.title: La presse italienne réclame la tête de Maurizio Sarri, la France rend hommage à l’exploit lyonnais

link.title: La presse italienne réclame la tête de Maurizio Sarri, la France rend hommage à l’exploit lyonnais

entry.content: L’Italie réclame le départ de Maurizio Sarri à la Juve, le coup des Lyonnais fait grand bruit et la victoire de Manchester City saluée en Angleterre, retrouvez dans votre revue de presse Foot Mercato les dernières informations de la presse sportive européenne.
entry.summary: L’Italie réclame le départ de Maurizio Sarri à la Juve, le coup des Lyonnais fait grand bruit et la victoire de Manchester City saluée en Angleterre, retrouvez dans votre revue de presse Foot Mercato les dernières informations de la presse sportive européenne.

entry.title: Eng vs Ire: Ireland breaks Team India’s record after chasing 320 against England Oneindia Sports

link.title: Eng vs Ire: Ireland breaks Team India’s record after chasing 320 against England Oneindia Sports

entry.content:
Ireland breaks Team India’s record after chasing 320 against England, Ireland shocked world champions England in their own den as skipper Andrew Balbirnie and Paul Stirling guided the visitors to a stunning seven-wicket at Southampton on Tuesday.While Stirling powered the visitor’s innings with a stellar 142, captain Balbirnie scored 113 to set up the win. The pair put on 264 for the second wicket as Ireland chased a target of 329.
आयरलैंड क्रिकेट टीम ने मंगलवार को इंग्लैंड के खिलाफ एक ऐसी जीत हासिल की जिसने इतिहास रच दिया। विश्व चैंपियन इंग्लैंड के खिलाफ 329 रन का स्कोर बनाकर जीत हासिल करना आयरलैंड के क्रिकेट इतिहास में हमेशा याद किया जाएगा। इस एक जीत के साथ आयरलैंड की टीम ने एक मामले में भारत की बराबरी कर ली और ऑस्ट्रेलिया, न्यूजीलैंड की टीमों को पीछे छोड़ दिया।
#EngvsIre #TeamIndia #2002NetWestTrophy
entry.summary: Ireland breaks Team India’s record after chasing 320 against England, Ireland shocked world champions England in their own den as skipper Andrew Balbirnie and Paul Stirling guided the visitors to a stunning seven-wicket at Southampton on Tuesday.While Stirling powered the visitor’s innings with a stellar 142, captain Balbirnie scored 113 to set up the win. The pair put on 264 for the second wicket as Ireland chased a target of 329. आयरलैंड क्रिकेट टीम ने मंगलवार को इंग्लैंड के खिलाफ एक ऐसी जीत हासिल की जिसने इतिहास रच दिया। विश्व चैंपियन इंग्लैंड के खिलाफ 329 रन का स्कोर बनाकर जीत हासिल करना आयरलैंड के क्रिकेट इतिहास में हमेशा याद किया जाएगा। इस एक जीत के साथ आयरलैंड की टीम ने एक मामले में भारत की बराबरी कर ली और ऑस्ट्रेलिया, न्यूजीलैंड की टीमों को पीछे छोड़ दिया। #EngvsIre #TeamIndia #2002NetWestTrophy

entry.title: Gold Price Hike : Reason బంగారం, వెండి ధరలు మరికొంతకాలం పెరగొచ్చు? Oneindia Telugu

link.title: Gold Price Hike : Reason బంగారం, వెండి ధరలు మరికొంతకాలం పెరగొచ్చు? Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
Gold surged to a fresh record, fueled by dollar weakness and low interest rates. Silver headed for its best month since 1979. Gold prices on Monday surged to hit a new high in Indian Market.
#GoldPriceHike
#GoldRateToday
#silverprice
#22Caratgold
#Internationalmarkets
#bullionmarket
#dollarweakness
#america
#lowinterestrates
బంగారం ధరలు రోజు రోజుకు పెరుగుతున్నాయి. శనివారం ఢిల్లీలో 24 క్యారెట్ల పసిడి ధర రూ.680 పెరిగి రూ.54,540 పలికింది. హైదరాబాద్‌లో 10 గ్రాములు రూ.220 పెరిగి రూ.55,820 పలికింది. గత పది రోజుల్లో బంగారం ధరలు రూ.4వేల వరకు పెరిగాయి.
entry.summary: Gold surged to a fresh record, fueled by dollar weakness and low interest rates. Silver headed for its best month since 1979. Gold prices on Monday surged to hit a new high in Indian Market. #GoldPriceHike #GoldRateToday #silverprice #22Caratgold #Internationalmarkets #bullionmarket #dollarweakness #america #lowinterestrates బంగారం ధరలు రోజు రోజుకు పెరుగుతున్నాయి. శనివారం ఢిల్లీలో 24 క్యారెట్ల పసిడి ధర రూ.680 పెరిగి రూ.54,540 పలికింది. హైదరాబాద్‌లో 10 గ్రాములు రూ.220 పెరిగి రూ.55,820 పలికింది. గత పది రోజుల్లో బంగారం ధరలు రూ.4వేల వరకు పెరిగాయి.

entry.title: Philippines denies it overtakes Indonesia as Southeast Asian country with most Covid-19 cases

link.title: Philippines denies it overtakes Indonesia as Southeast Asian country with most Covid-19 cases

entry.content: Philippine officials denied the country has surpassed Indonesia as nation with most Covid-19 infections in Southeast Asia on August 7, 2020. On August 6, the Philippines reported 119,460 cases while Indonesia confirmed 118,753 that same day. The Philippines said this is because the country has a higher coronavirus testing rate than Indonesia.
entry.summary: Philippine officials denied the country has surpassed Indonesia as nation with most Covid-19 infections in Southeast Asia on August 7, 2020. On August 6, the Philippines reported 119,460 cases while Indonesia confirmed 118,753 that same day. The Philippines said this is because the country has a higher coronavirus testing rate than Indonesia.

entry.title: Kaanadante Maayavadanu Behind The scenes Part 03 Filmibeat Kannada

link.title: Kaanadante Maayavadanu Behind The scenes Part 03 Filmibeat Kannada

entry.content:
ಕಾಣದಂತೆ ಮಾಯವಾದನು ಈ ವರ್ಷ ತೆರೆಕಂಡಂತಹ ಫ್ಯಾನ್ಟಸಿ ಸಿನಿಮಾ. ಕಾಣದಂತೆ ಮಾಯವಾದನು ಸಿನಿಮಾದ ಕೆಲವು ತೆರೆ ಹಿಂದಿನ ದೃಶ್ಯಗಳು
Kaanadante Maayavadanu is a 2020 romantic fantasy Kannada film directed by debutante Raj Pathipati and produced by Back Benchers Motion Picture. Here are some behind the scenes footage of Kaanadante Maayavadanu
entry.summary: ಕಾಣದಂತೆ ಮಾಯವಾದನು ಈ ವರ್ಷ ತೆರೆಕಂಡಂತಹ ಫ್ಯಾನ್ಟಸಿ ಸಿನಿಮಾ. ಕಾಣದಂತೆ ಮಾಯವಾದನು ಸಿನಿಮಾದ ಕೆಲವು ತೆರೆ ಹಿಂದಿನ ದೃಶ್ಯಗಳು Kaanadante Maayavadanu is a 2020 romantic fantasy Kannada film directed by debutante Raj Pathipati and produced by Back Benchers Motion Picture. Here are some behind the scenes footage of Kaanadante Maayavadanu

entry.title: Toddler Battling From Spina Bifida Practices Walking With Supporter

link.title: Toddler Battling From Spina Bifida Practices Walking With Supporter

entry.content: This toddler was battling from a condition in her spine called spina bifida. Her parents were told during the time of her birth that she might never be able to walk. Thankfully, she kept practicing via her supporter and could finally walk without it after her’s and her parent’s constant efforts.
entry.summary: This toddler was battling from a condition in her spine called spina bifida. Her parents were told during the time of her birth that she might never be able to walk. Thankfully, she kept practicing via her supporter and could finally walk without it after her’s and her parent’s constant efforts.

entry.title: Tributes paid as John Hume laid to rest

link.title: Tributes paid as John Hume laid to rest

entry.content:
Tributes have paid to SDLP leader John Hume, who was instrumental in achieving the Good Friday Agreement. Political figures including First Minister Arlene Foster, Deputy First Minister Michelle O’Neill and Irish President Michael D Higgins were among the limited mourners who attended the ceremony in St Eugene’s Cathedral in Derry.
Report by Etemadil. Like us on Facebook at and follow us on Twitter at
entry.summary: Tributes have paid to SDLP leader John Hume, who was instrumental in achieving the Good Friday Agreement. Political figures including First Minister Arlene Foster, Deputy First Minister Michelle O’Neill and Irish President Michael D Higgins were among the limited mourners who attended the ceremony in St Eugene’s Cathedral in Derry. Report by Etemadil. Like us on Facebook at and follow us on Twitter at

entry.title: Trump claims Biden, a devout Catholic, wants to ‘hurt God’

link.title: Trump claims Biden, a devout Catholic, wants to ‘hurt God’

entry.content:
Trump claims Biden, a devout Catholic, wants to ‘hurt God’
Trump claims Biden, a devout Catholic, wants to ‘hurt God’
Trump claims Biden, a devout Catholic, wants to 'hurt God'

entry.title: Jackson Wang Sings Post Malone, GOT7, and “100 Ways” in a Game of Song Association

link.title: Jackson Wang Sings Post Malone, GOT7, and “100 Ways” in a Game of Song Association

entry.content: One year ago today, Jackson Wang and the rest of GOT7 were trying their hand at a round of Song Association. This time, Wang is all on his own. Tune in as he covers Post Malone and sings his solo hit, "100 Ways."
entry.summary: One year ago today, Jackson Wang and the rest of GOT7 were trying their hand at a round of Song Association. This time, Wang is all on his own. Tune in as he covers Post Malone and sings his solo hit, "100 Ways."

entry.title: Bordeaux Primeurs 2019 : Six vins bio de première classe sélectionnés par La RVF en vente sur La Grande Cave

link.title: Bordeaux Primeurs 2019 : Six vins bio de première classe sélectionnés par La RVF en vente sur La Grande Cave

entry.content: La RVF s’associe à La Grande Cave pour vous proposer une caisse exclusive de six jolis vins de Bordeaux 2019 certifiés en agriculture biologique ou biodynamique.
entry.summary: La RVF s’associe à La Grande Cave pour vous proposer une caisse exclusive de six jolis vins de Bordeaux 2019 certifiés en agriculture biologique ou biodynamique.

entry.title: Berbagai Sanksi Pelanggaran Protokol Kesehatan di Indonesia dan Luar Negeri

link.title: Berbagai Sanksi Pelanggaran Protokol Kesehatan di Indonesia dan Luar Negeri

entry.content:
JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Satu per satu daerah menerapkan sanksi tegas, agar warganya disiplin menjalankan protokol kesehatan.
Apalagi, pekan ini Presiden Joko Widodo sudah menanda-tangani Instruksi Presiden Nomor 6 Tahun 2020, sebagai payung hukum.
Salah satu poinnya adalah sanksi bagi yang tidak mematuhi protokol kesehatan, yang wajib dibuat oleh pemerintah daerah.
Sanksi berupa teguran lisan atau teguran tertulis, kerja sosial, denda administratif, dan penghentian atau penutupan sementara sebuah usaha.
Bicara soal sanksi administratif atau berupa denda.
Dua daerah yang telah menerapkan, yakni Jakarta dan Jawa Barat.
Besarannya bervariasi. Bagi warga yang bandel tak memakai masker di luar rumah, dapat didenda, 250 ribu rupiah di Jakarta. Sementara di Jawa Barat, seratus ribu rupiah.
Sedangkan bagi para pelaku usaha. Besaran denda bagi yang tidak menjalankan protokol kesehatan, berkisar antara 10 juta hingga 25 juta rupiah di Jakarta.
Dan 300 ribu hingga 500 ribu rupiah di jawa barat. Bergantung lokasinya , apakah di fasilitas umum atau tempat kerja.
Bagaimana jika kita bandingkan di beberapa kota atau negara lain, soal denda tak memakai masker.
Di Beverly Hills, Amerika Serikat, 100 dollar. Singapura, 3 ratus dollar Singapura. Malaysia, seribu ringgit. Dan Perancis 135 euro.
Jika dirupiahkan. Kisarannya, antara 1,5 hingga 3,5 juta rupiah.
Jadi ingat, selalu patuhi protokol kesehatan, untuk mencegah penularan covid sembilan belas. Memakai masker saat berinteraksi, dan jaga jarak fisik.
entry.summary: JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Satu per satu daerah menerapkan sanksi tegas, agar warganya disiplin menjalankan protokol kesehatan. Apalagi, pekan ini Presiden Joko Widodo sudah menanda-tangani Instruksi Presiden Nomor 6 Tahun 2020, sebagai payung hukum. Salah satu poinnya adalah sanksi bagi yang tidak mematuhi protokol kesehatan, yang wajib dibuat oleh pemerintah daerah. Sanksi berupa teguran lisan atau teguran tertulis, kerja sosial, denda administratif, dan penghentian atau penutupan sementara sebuah usaha. Bicara soal sanksi administratif atau berupa denda. Dua daerah yang telah menerapkan, yakni Jakarta dan Jawa Barat. Besarannya bervariasi. Bagi warga yang bandel tak memakai masker di luar rumah, dapat didenda, 250 ribu rupiah di Jakarta. Sementara di Jawa Barat, seratus ribu rupiah. Sedangkan bagi para pelaku usaha. Besaran denda bagi yang tidak menjalankan protokol kesehatan, berkisar antara 10 juta hingga 25 juta rupiah di Jakarta. Dan 300 ribu hingga 500 ribu rupiah di jawa barat. Bergantung lokasinya , apakah di fasilitas umum atau tempat kerja. Bagaimana jika kita bandingkan di beberapa kota atau negara lain, soal denda tak memakai masker. Di Beverly Hills, Amerika Serikat, 100 dollar. Singapura, 3 ratus dollar Singapura. Malaysia, seribu ringgit. Dan Perancis 135 euro. Jika dirupiahkan. Kisarannya, antara 1,5 hingga 3,5 juta rupiah. Jadi ingat, selalu patuhi protokol kesehatan, untuk mencegah penularan covid sembilan belas. Memakai masker saat berinteraksi, dan jaga jarak fisik.

entry.title: Ligue des champions : pourquoi l’OL a ses chances contre la Juventus

link.title: Ligue des champions : pourquoi l’OL a ses chances contre la Juventus

entry.content:
Vainqueur 1-0 à l’aller, Lyon a un exploit à valider contre la Juventus de Cristiano Ronaldo, vendredi, à Turin, en huitième de finale retour de la Ligue des champions. Même si la Juve a récemment remporté son neuvième titre consécutif de champion d’Italie, les Lyonnais ont des raisons de croire fermement en leurs chances.
Retrouvez "La matinale d’Europe 1 - Le 6h - 9h" sur :
entry.summary: Vainqueur 1-0 à l’aller, Lyon a un exploit à valider contre la Juventus de Cristiano Ronaldo, vendredi, à Turin, en huitième de finale retour de la Ligue des champions. Même si la Juve a récemment remporté son neuvième titre consécutif de champion d’Italie, les Lyonnais ont des raisons de croire fermement en leurs chances. Retrouvez "La matinale d’Europe 1 - Le 6h - 9h" sur :

entry.title: Stargirl S01E13 Stars & S.T.R.I.P.E. Part Two - Season Finale

link.title: Stargirl S01E13 Stars & S.T.R.I.P.E. Part Two - Season Finale

entry.content: DC’s Stargirl 1x13 "Stars & S.T.R.I.P.E. - Part Two" Season 1 Episode 13 Promo Trailer HD (Season Finale) - PROJECT NEW AMERICA — As the Injustice Society of America come one step closer to accomplishing their mission, Courtney (Brec Bassinger) and the JSA face off with Icicle and the villains of the ISA. Luke Wilson, Amy Smart, Yvette Monreal, Anjelika Washington, Cameron Gellman, Trae Romano, Meg DeLacy, Neil Jackson and Christopher James Baker also star. Greg Beeman directed the episode written by Geoff Johns (#113). Original airdate 8/11/2020.
entry.summary: DC’s Stargirl 1x13 "Stars & S.T.R.I.P.E. - Part Two" Season 1 Episode 13 Promo Trailer HD (Season Finale) - PROJECT NEW AMERICA — As the Injustice Society of America come one step closer to accomplishing their mission, Courtney (Brec Bassinger) and the JSA face off with Icicle and the villains of the ISA. Luke Wilson, Amy Smart, Yvette Monreal, Anjelika Washington, Cameron Gellman, Trae Romano, Meg DeLacy, Neil Jackson and Christopher James Baker also star. Greg Beeman directed the episode written by Geoff Johns (#113). Original airdate 8/11/2020.

entry.title: RUTH WEISS THE BEAT GODDESS Documentary movie

link.title: RUTH WEISS THE BEAT GODDESS Documentary movie

entry.content:
RUTH WEISS : THE BEAT GODDESS Documentary movie trailer - Plot synopsis: Anew film from multi-award winning filmmaker Melody C.Miller, celebrates the life and work of a wonderful talent and woman.
In a life that has spanned 92 creative years, ruth weiss is one of the most influential writers of the Beat Generation. Born to a Jewish family during the rise of Nazism, as a 10-year-old refugee, she escaped to the United States. ruth became a Jazz troubadour exemplifying the zeitgeist of Chicago, New Orleans, and San Francisco. In the 1950s, she opened up and organized the first poetry readings in North Beach cafes and bars, giving a platform to many poets.
The film further highlights ruth weiss’ electrifying and intimate poetry with breathtaking images of exquisite modern dance, art, animation, and music to embody her oeuvre. This film documents not only Weiss’ gift to humanity but archives significant historical moments in our world’s social and literary movements. As a contemporary of Lawrence Ferlinghetti and Jack Kerouac, she innovated poetry to jazz. Legend Herb Caen dubbed Ruth Weiss as "The Goddess of the Beat Generation" because of her contribution to the culture of North Beach and the Bay Area poetry scene.
The film premiered at the Asolo Art Film Festival in Italy, won Best Documentary at the Peekskill Film Festival, won Visionary Women In Film Award at the Santa Cruz Film Festival, and is nominated for Best Documentary at 10 other film festivals nationwide. Ruth Weiss was awarded the 2020 Maverick Spirit Award from the Cinequest Film Festival. This prestigious award is given to influential individuals who embody the independent and innovative mindset and has previously been awarded to Werner Herzog, Harrison Ford, Jackie Chan, and many more.
Ruth Weiss The Beat Goddess will have its UK premiere at the Romford Film Festival, August 18.
Says director Melody C.Miller, “it is up to us as ruth weiss’s friends and fans to make sure her poetry is read, heard, and experienced. We are honored to share the film with audiences in the UK. Before ruth passed, one of our last conversations was about the UK premiere and she was excited and will travel there in spirit.”
entry.summary: RUTH WEISS : THE BEAT GODDESS Documentary movie trailer - Plot synopsis: Anew film from multi-award winning filmmaker Melody C.Miller, celebrates the life and work of a wonderful talent and woman. In a life that has spanned 92 creative years, ruth weiss is one of the most influential writers of the Beat Generation. Born to a Jewish family during the rise of Nazism, as a 10-year-old refugee, she escaped to the United States. ruth became a Jazz troubadour exemplifying the zeitgeist of Chicago, New Orleans, and San Francisco. In the 1950s, she opened up and organized the first poetry readings in North Beach cafes and bars, giving a platform to many poets. The film further highlights ruth weiss’ electrifying and intimate poetry with breathtaking images of exquisite modern dance, art, animation, and music to embody her oeuvre. This film documents not only Weiss’ gift to humanity but archives significant historical moments in our world’s social and literary movements. As a contemporary of Lawrence Ferlinghetti and Jack Kerouac, she innovated poetry to jazz. Legend Herb Caen dubbed Ruth Weiss as "The Goddess of the Beat Generation" because of her contribution to the culture of North Beach and the Bay Area poetry scene. The film premiered at the Asolo Art Film Festival in Italy, won Best Documentary at the Peekskill Film Festival, won Visionary Women In Film Award at the Santa Cruz Film Festival, and is nominated for Best Documentary at 10 other film festivals nationwide. Ruth Weiss was awarded the 2020 Maverick Spirit Award from the Cinequest Film Festival. This prestigious award is given to influential individuals who embody the independent and innovative mindset and has previously been awarded to Werner Herzog, Harrison Ford, Jackie Chan, and many more. Ruth Weiss The Beat Goddess will have its UK premiere at the Romford Film Festival, August 18. Says director Melody C.Miller, “it is up to us as ruth weiss’s friends and fans to make sure her poetry is read, heard, and experienced. We are honored to share the film with audiences in the UK. Before ruth passed, one of our last conversations was about the UK premiere and she was excited and will travel there in spirit.”
